title: WB coal scam case: Supreme Court seeks 'kingpin' Anup Majee's response to ED plea challenging anticipatory bail
description: The Supreme Court on Tuesday sought a response from alleged coal smuggling kingpin Anup Majee on a plea filed by the Directorate of Enforcement (ED) challenging the anticipatory bail granted to him in a money laundering case linked to the alleged multi-crore coal mining scam in West Bengal.A Bench of Justices Vikram Nath and Sandeep Mehta issued notice on the ED’s plea challenging a 2025 order of the Delhi High Court granting anticipatory bail to Majee.Pertinently,
